session_start: cat .claude/skills/satelink/SKILL.md 2>/dev/null | head -80 || echo 'Skill file not found'

if [ -f agent/memory/CURRENT_TASK.md ]; then echo '📋 RESUMING TASK:'; cat agent/memory/CURRENT_TASK.md; else echo '📊 NO ACTIVE TASK — reading PROGRESS.md'; cat agent/memory/PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | tail -30; fi
bash scripts/agent-env-check.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'env-check script not found'
docker ps --filter name=postgres --filter name=redis --format 'table {{.Names}}	{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  Docker not running'
session_end: echo '=== SESSION END — updating PROGRESS.md if needed ==='
